get.description: Verify that the API is available and responding to requests.
List the permission catalog available for role assignment. Requires `role_permissions:manage`.

schema.title: Response List Permissions V1 Rbac Permissions Get

403.description: User lacks permission to read role permissions.

get.description: List all roles and their permission grants. Requires `roles:manage`.

schema.title: Response List Roles V1 Rbac Roles Get

403.description: User lacks permission to read roles.
User lacks permission to create roles.

delete.description: Delete a role and remove its role-permission and user-role assignments. Requires `roles:manage`.

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

403.description: User lacks permission to delete roles.

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

403.description: User lacks permission to update roles.

delete.description: Detach a parent role from a child role. Requires `roles:manage`.

parameters.description: Parent role ID used for role inheritance.
parameters.name: parent_role_id

schema.description: Parent role ID used for role inheritance.
schema.title: Parent Role Id

204.description: Role inheritance removed (or was already absent).

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

403.description: User lacks permission to manage role inheritance.

404.description: Child role or parent role does not exist.

put.description: Attach a parent role to a child role. Requires `roles:manage`.

parameters.description: Parent role ID used for role inheritance.
parameters.name: parent_role_id

schema.description: Parent role ID used for role inheritance.
schema.title: Parent Role Id

403.description: User lacks permission to manage role inheritance.

404.description: Child role or parent role does not exist.

409.description: Inheritance assignment would introduce a cycle.

delete.description: Remove a permission grant from a role. Requires `role_permissions:manage`.

204.description: Role permission removed (or was already absent).

400.description: Invalid role ID or permission ID.

403.description: User lacks permission to manage role permissions.

404.description: Role or permission does not exist.

put.description: Assign or update a permission grant on a role. Requires `role_permissions:manage`.

schema.description: Assign or update a permission grant on a role.

example.detail: Invalid permission scope 'regional'. Expected one of ['any', 'own', 'tenant'].

400.description: Invalid role ID, permission ID, or scope.

403.description: User lacks permission to manage role permissions.

404.description: Role or permission does not exist.

get.description: List users directly assigned to a role. Requires `user_roles:manage`.

schema.title: Response List Role Users V1 Rbac Roles  Role Id  Users Get

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

403.description: User lacks permission to read role user assignments.

get.summary: List users assigned to a role

get.description: List all users managed by RBAC admin APIs. Requires `users:manage`.

schema.title: Response List Users V1 Rbac Users Get

403.description: User lacks permission to read users.

violations: Password must include at least one uppercase letter

403.description: User lacks permission to create users.

404.description: A provided role does not exist.

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

403.description: User lacks permission to delete users.

get.description: Get a user by ID for administrative management. Requires `users:manage`.

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

403.description: User lacks permission to read users.

schema.description: Payload to update an administrative user.

example.detail: At least one field must be provided to update the user

403.description: User lacks permission to update users.

404.description: User or role does not exist.

get.description: List roles directly assigned to a user (does not include inherited parent roles). Requires `user_roles:manage`.

schema.title: Response List User Roles V1 Rbac Users  User Id  Roles Get

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

403.description: User lacks permission to read user role assignments.

get.summary: List roles assigned to a user

delete.description: Remove a role from a user. Requires `user_roles:manage`.

204.description: Role removed from user (or was already absent).

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

400.description: Invalid user ID or role ID.

403.description: User lacks permission to manage user role assignments.

404.description: User or role does not exist.

put.description: Assign a role to a user. Requires `user_roles:manage`.

meta.msg: Input should be greater than or equal to 1

400.description: Invalid user ID or role ID.

403.description: User lacks permission to manage user role assignments.

404.description: User or role does not exist.

post.description: Authenticate a user with `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` and return a JWT bearer token.

403.description: User is authenticated but inactive.

get.description: Return the user associated with the bearer token in the `Authorization` header.

403.description: User is authenticated but inactive.

patch.description: Update `username`, password, or both. Password change requires both `current_password` and `new_password`.

example.detail: At least one field must be provided to update the user

400.description: Invalid request or no effective changes.

401.description: Invalid token or incorrect current password.

403.description: User is authenticated but inactive.

409.description: New username is already in use.

post.description: Create a local active user. `username` is normalized to lowercase and the password must satisfy the service password policy.

violations: Password must include at least one uppercase letter

400.description: Invalid registration input or password policy violation.
